Qualifier: this qualifier is intended to be interpreted with the next TID called DR IC50 uM. If qualifier is = than DR IC50 uM equals to the value in that column, if qualifier is > than DR IC50 uM is bigger than that value
DR IC50 uM: IC50 determined from a 10-point dose response assay
DR IC50 R2: R2 value, the square of the linear correlation coefficient for a given fit cell.
DR IC50 Hill Slope: Hill slope value or slope value quantifies the steepness of the curve; a dose response curve with a standard slope has a Hill slope of 1.0
DR % inhibition @ 50 uM: Dose response (n=1) % inhibition of the assay at 50 uM compound calculated from the mean max and min plate controls
DR Plate Mean max signal: Dose response plate Mean maximum assay signal window plate controls n=32
DR Plate Mean min signal: Dose response plate Mean minimum assay signal window plate controls n=24
DR plate Z'-factor: Dose response plate Z'-factor calculated from the maximum and mimimum assay signal window plate controls
DR Assay Date: Date the dose response assay was performed
